title: Environment Variables Checker with leak detection

transitions.note: Implement env checker: config, script, docs, tests, CI placeholders, prebuild.
typecheck, lint, build, docs:check, test:env-check all passed; awaiting commit.

notes: Production-grade env checker. Never prints secret values, lengths, or masked previews. prebuild runs basic check only. CI uses non-secret placeholders so build passes without real secrets.
